[context_compliance] Locked decision 'observation code evidence references' has no implementing task**\nCONTEXT.md locked decision 'Observation code evidence references (file paths, class names) shown in the trace data flow' has no implementing task in any plan. Plan 03 handles entity flow display but does not mention rendering code evidence references (file paths, class names) from observations.\nFix hint: Add code evidence rendering to Plan 03 Task 1 action (in the agent detail LLM call expansion or entity flow detail) or create a sub-task for it.\n\n### Warnings (should fix)\n\n**1. [scope_sanity] Plan 01 Task 1 is overloaded**\nTask 1 has 10 sub-steps: create type file + 4 new capture methods + wire into 3 pipeline stages + extend updateProgress. This is effectively 2-3 tasks crammed into one, risking <USER_ID_REDACTED> degradation.\nFix hint: Consider splitting: Task 1 = type contracts + capture methods, Task 2 = wiring into pipeline stages + updateProgress extension, Task 3 (existing) = trace history.\n\n**2. [task_completeness] Plan 01 Task 1 files_modified may be incomplete**\nAction Step B.6 says 'Add an onLLMCall callback to SemanticAnalyzer' but SemanticAnalyzer source file is not listed in files_modified.
